question_en: I went 10 m East, then turned North and walked 15 m, then turned West and walked 12 m, and then turned South and walked 15 m. How far will I be from my home?
question_hi: मैं 10 मी. पूर्व में गया फिर उत्तर में मुड़ा और 15 मी. चला, फिर पश्चिम में मुड़ा और 12 मी. चला और फिर दक्षिण मुड़ा और 15 मी. चला। मैं मेरे घर में कितना दूर पर होगा?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Starting from the origin, moving 10m East, 15m North, 12m West, and 15m South puts the person 2m West of the starting point.
fingerprint: i went 10 m east then turned north and walked 15 m then turned west and walked 12 m and then turned south and walked 15 m how far will i be from my home

subject: maths
explanation: Let initial numbers be 70 and 80. After a 20% and 10% increase, they become 84 and 88, which simplifies to the ratio 21:22.

question_en: In this question, two statements are given followed by two conclusions. Choose the conclusions that fit best logically. Statement: 1. All pens are pencils. 2. All books are pens. Conclusions: I. Some books are pens. II. Some pencils are books.
question_hi: इस प्रश्न में, दो कथन दिए गए हैं जिनके बाद दो निष्कर्ष दिए गए हैं । वे निष्कर्ष चुनिए जो तार्किक रूप से सर्वोत्तम सटीक बैठते हैं। कथन: 1. सभी पेन पेंसिल हैं। 2. सभी पुस्तकें पेन हैं। निष्कर्ष : I. कुछ पुस्तकें पेन है। II. कुछ पेंसिल्स पुस्तकें हैं।
options_en: Neither conclusion I nor II follows
Both conclusions I and II follow
options_hi: केवल निष्कर्ष II अनुसरण करता है।
न तो निष्कर्ष I न ही II अनुसरण करता है
केवल निष्कर्ष I अनुसरण करता है
दोनों निष्कर्ष I और II अनुसरण करते हैं
subject: reasoning
explanation: Since all books are pens, some books must be pens. Since all books are pens and all pens are pencils, all books are pencils, meaning some pencils are books.
fingerprint: in this question two statements are given followed by two conclusions choose the conclusions that fit best logically statement 1 all pens are pencils 2 all books are pens conclusions i some books are pens ii some pencils are books

question_en: _____ must be continuously refreshed to store information, otherwise it will lose what it holds.

options_en: Double Data Rate Synchronous Dynamic Random Access Memory (DDR-SDRAM)
options_hi: डबल डाटा रेट सिंक्रोनस डायनमिक रेण्डम ऐक्सेस मेमरी (DDR-SDRAM)

fingerprint: must be continuously refreshed to store information otherwise it will lose what it holds

question_en: What is the maximum number of pieces a cube can be cut into with 13 cuts?
question_hi: एक घन को 13 काट लगाते हुए अधिकतम कितने टुकड़ों में काटा जा सकता है ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: To maximize pieces, cuts should be distributed as evenly as possible along the three axes. 13 cuts = 5 + 4 + 4. Pieces = (5+1) x (4+1) x (4+1) = 6 x 5 x 5 = 150 pieces.
fingerprint: what is the maximum number of pieces a cube can be cut into with 13 cuts

question_en: A jar full of whisky contains 40% alcohol. A part of this whisky is replaced by another containing 19% alcohol and now the percentage of alcohol was found to be 26. The quantity of whisky replaced is
question_hi: व्हिस्की से भरे एक जार में 40% अल्कोहल है। इस व्हिस्की के एक हिस्से को दूसरे से बदल दिया जाता है जिसमें 19% अल्कोहल था और अब अल्कोहल का प्रतिशत 26 पाया गया। बदले गए व्हिस्की की मात्रा है
subject: maths
explanation: Using alligation rule: Ratio of original to new = (26-19) / (40-26) = 7 / 14 = 1 : 2. Since 2 parts out of 3 are the new whisky, the replaced quantity is 2/3.

question_en: In a row of boys, Kapil is eighth from the right and Nikunj is twelfth from the left. When Nikunj and Kapil interchange their positions, Nikunj becomes 21st from the left. Which of the following will be Kapil's position from the right?
question_hi: लड़कों की एक पंक्ति में, कपिल दाएँ से आठवाँ और निकुंज बाएँ से बारहवाँ है। जब निकुंज और कपिल अपने स्थान आपस में बदलते हैं, तो निकुंज बाएँ से 21वाँ हो जाता है। निम्नलिखित में से कपिल का स्थान दाएँ से कौन-सा होगा?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Nikunj moves from 12th left to 21st left, gaining 9 positions. So Kapil must also move 9 positions rightwards from his original right rank. 8 + 9 = 17th.
fingerprint: in a row of boys kapil is eighth from the right and nikunj is twelfth from the left when nikunj and kapil interchange their positions nikunj becomes 21st from the left which of the following will be kapils position from the right

question_en: The word Internet is derived from two words ____.
question_hi: शब्द इंटरनेट दो शब्दों ____ से व्युत्पन्न है।
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The term "Internet" is a portmanteau of "Interconnection" and "Networks".
fingerprint: the word internet is derived from two words

question_en: Since when has the Reserve Bank issued bank notes in the Mahatma Gandhi series?
question_hi: रिज़र्व बैंक ने महात्मा गांधी शृंखला में बैंक नोट कब से जारी किए हैं ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The Reserve Bank of India introduced the Mahatma Gandhi series of banknotes in 1996.
fingerprint: since when has the reserve bank issued bank notes in the mahatma gandhi series

question_en: Who published the newspaper 'Risorgimento'?
question_hi: ‘रिसोर्गिमेंटो’ समाचार पत्र किसने प्रकाशित किया ?
subject: general-awareness
explanation: The newspaper 'Il Risorgimento' was founded in 1847 by Count Camillo Benso di Cavour and Cesare Balbo, playing a key role in the Italian unification.
fingerprint: who published the newspaper risorgimento

question_en: A piece of wire of resistance R is cut into five equal parts. These parts are then connected in parallel. If the equivalent resistance of this combination is R', then the ratio R/R' is
question_hi: प्रतिरोध R वाला एक तार का टुकड़ा पाँच बराबर भागों में काटा गया है। फिर इन भागों को समांतर में जोड़ा गया है। यदि इस संयोजन का समतुल्य प्रतिरोध R' है, तो R/R' का अनुपात है
subject: general-science
explanation: Each cut part has a resistance of R/5. When 5 such parts are connected in parallel, 1/R' = 5/(R/5) = 25/R, so R' = R/25. Therefore, R/R' = 25.
fingerprint: a piece of wire of resistance r is cut into five equal parts these parts are then connected in parallel if the equivalent resistance of this combination is r then the ratio rr is

question_en: Which number will come in place of the question mark? 1, 5, 17, 53, 161, ?
question_hi: प्रश्न चिन्ह के स्थान पर कौन-सी संख्या आएगी? 1, 5, 17, 53, 161, ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The pattern follows multiplying by 3 and adding 2: 1x3+2=5, 5x3+2=17, 17x3+2=53, 53x3+2=161. Next is 161x3+2 = 483+2 = 485.
fingerprint: which number will come in place of the question mark 1 5 17 53 161
